case h₁.h₁.h₂
α : Type u_1
ε' : Type u_3
m0 : MeasurableSpace α
α' : Type u_4
m : MeasurableSpace α'
inst✝⁴ : TopologicalSpace α
𝕂 : Type u_8
inst✝³ : RCLike 𝕂
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ε'
inst✝¹ : ENormedSpace ε'
T : (α → 𝕂) → α' → ε'
p p' : ENNReal
μ : Measure α
inst✝ : IsLocallyFiniteMeasure μ
ν : Measure α'
c : NNReal
c_pos : 0 < c
hT :
  @MeasureTheory.HasRestrictedWeakType α m0 α' ε' m inst✝² inst✝¹.toENorm 𝕂
    NormedCommRing.toNonUnitalNormedCommRing.toNonUnitalCommRing.toNonUnitalNonAssocCommRing.toNonUnitalNonAssocCommSemiring.toMulZeroClass.toZero
    NormedField.toNormedCommRing.toAddGroupWithOne.toOne T p p' μ ν ↑c
hpp' : p.HolderConjugate p'
T_meas :
  ∀ {f : α → 𝕂}
    (a :
      @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α 𝕂 m0 SeminormedAddGroup.toContinuousENorm.toENorm
        PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f p 1 μ),
    AEStronglyMeasurable (T f) ν
T_subadd :
  ∀ (f g : α → 𝕂) (x : α')
    (a :
      @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α 𝕂 m0 SeminormedAddGroup.toContinuousENorm.toENorm
        PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f p 1 μ)
    (a :
      @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α 𝕂 m0 SeminormedAddGroup.toContinuousENorm.toENorm
        PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace g p 1 μ),
    ‖T (f + g) x‖ₑ ≤ ‖T f x + T g x‖ₑ
T_submul : ∀ (a : 𝕂) (f : α → 𝕂) (x : α'), ‖T (a • f) x‖ₑ ≤ ‖a‖ₑ • ‖T f x‖ₑ
weakly_cont_T :
  ∀ {f : α → 𝕂} {fs : ℕ → α → 𝕂},
    LocallyIntegrable f μ →
      (∀ (n : ℕ), AEStronglyMeasurable (fs n) μ) →
        (∀ (a : α), Monotone fun n => ‖fs n a‖) →
          (∀ (a : α), Filter.Tendsto (fun n => fs n a) Filter.atTop (nhds (f a))) →
            ∀ (G : Set α'),
              eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ Filter.limsup (fun n => eLpNorm (T (fs n)) 1 (ν.restrict G)) Filter.atTop
G : Set α'
measurable_G : MeasurableSet G
G_finite : ν G < ⊤
g : α → 𝕂
stronglyMeasurable_g : StronglyMeasurable g
hg : @MeasureTheory.eLorentzNorm α 𝕂 m0 SeminormedAddGroup.toContinuousENorm.toENorm g p 1 μ < ⊤
g₁ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₂ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₃ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₄ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g_decomposition :
  g =
    1 • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₁ + -1 • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₂ +
        RCLike.I • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₃ +
      -RCLike.I • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₄
T' : (α → NNReal) → α' → ε' := ⋯
hT' :
  @MeasureTheory.HasRestrictedWeakType α m0 α' ε' m inst✝² inst✝¹.toENorm NNReal instZeroNNReal instOneNNReal T' p p' μ
    ν ↑c
weaklyCont_T' :
  @MeasureTheory.WeaklyContinuous α NNReal ε' m0 α' m NNReal.instTopologicalSpace instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm
    inst✝¹.toENorm NNReal.instConditionallyCompleteLinearOrderBot.toSupSet instPartialOrderNNReal.toPreorder T' p μ ν
T'_subadd :
  ∀ (f g : α → NNReal)
    (a : @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm NNReal.instTopologicalSpace f p 1 μ)
    (a : @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm NNReal.instTopologicalSpace g p 1 μ),
    eLpNorm (T' (f + g)) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ eLpNorm (T' f) 1 (ν.restrict G) + eLpNorm (T' g) 1 (ν.restrict G)
T'_submul : ∀ (f : α → NNReal) (a : NNReal), eLpNorm (T' (a • f)) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ eLpNorm (a • T' f) 1 (ν.restrict G)
helper :
  ∀ {f : α → NNReal},
    Measurable f →
      ∀
        (hf' :
          @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm NNReal.instTopologicalSpace f p 1 μ),

          ↑c / p * @MeasureTheory.eLorentzNorm α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm f p 1 μ * ν G ^ p'⁻¹.toReal
⊢ eLpNorm (T' g₂) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤
    ↑c / p * @MeasureTheory.eLorentzNorm α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm g₂ p 1 μ * ν G ^ p'⁻¹.toReal
